meta.title: InfoWeb | Website as a Service
meta.description: InfoWeb provides managed websites for small businesses: domain, maintenance, bookings, dashboards, payments, and CMS access.
meta.ogImageAlt: InfoWeb — managed websites, hosting, and updates for small businesses on a plan billed every 4 weeks.

hero.eyebrow: Website as a Service for small businesses
hero.title: Your complete digital presence, managed at one price every 4 weeks.
hero.subtitle: InfoWeb builds, hosts, updates, and improves your website so your business looks professional online without hiring an internal tech team.

card.label: Managed site plan
card.item3: Upgrade path for payments and teams
card.note: Restaurants, clinics, local services, freelancers, and shops.

proof.item3: Built and maintained by a software engineer

pricing.title: Pick the level of digital presence your business needs.
pricing.subtitle: Start with a professional site and grow into bookings, dashboards, payments, and internal users when the business needs it.

basic.name: Basic
basic.description: A clean informative website with domain and maintenance included.

professional.name: Professional
professional.description: Everything in Basic plus booking flows and a simple business dashboard.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: For businesses that need payments, customer workflows, and team access.

custom.name: Custom
custom.description: Need integrations, automations, or a custom web app? Scope it directly with the developer.

offer.badge: Early bird: €10 lifetime discount for the first clients
offer.label: Early bird offer
offer.title: €10 lifetime discount for the first clients.
offer.copy: Lock the discount while you keep an active plan billed every 4 weeks.

addon.label: Optional add-on
addon.title: +€15 every 4 weeks for CMS access.
addon.copy: Edit selected website content yourself while InfoWeb keeps the technical layer managed.

payback.title: How many new clients does the website need to pay for itself?
payback.copy: Pick the plan and your average client value. We tell you how many new clients the website needs to bring each billing period (every 4 weeks) to fully pay for itself.
payback.planLabel: Plan (same prices as above, every 4 weeks)
payback.clientsHelper: On average, to cover each billing period
payback.note: Example only: real results depend on your offer, margins, location, and follow-up speed.

caseStudies.title: Case studies: typical InfoWeb setups for real businesses.

card1.title: Menu, reservations, and local SEO
card1.copy: Example setup: a fast site with menu highlights, reservation CTA, opening hours, and Google-ready structure.

card2.title: Services, bookings, and patient leads
card2.copy: Example setup: service pages, team credibility, booking requests, and clear contact routing.

card3.title: Quote requests and simple dashboard
card3.copy: Example setup: a conversion-focused site for trades, cleaners, tutors, or consultants, with optional dashboard.

developer.title: A full-stack developer, not a faceless template vendor.
developer.copy1: I manage InfoWeb directly. I am Henrique Sousa, founder and full-stack developer at Sousa Dev, a Software Engineer with a Master's degree in Robotics and Intelligent Systems and a track record of building public, practical software.
developer.copy2: My first public project, Sao Miguel Bus, solved a real transport information problem in the Azores. I bring that same engineering mindset here: reliable systems, clear communication, and websites that keep working after launch.

contact.title: Get a managed website ready for real customers.
contact.copy: Send the basics and you will get a practical next step: plan recommendation, timeline, and what is needed to launch.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your business, preferred plan, and launch timing.

meta.title: Affiliate Programme — Earn Monthly for Every Client You Refer | InfoWeb
meta.description: Join the InfoWeb affiliate programme. Refer clients or sell managed website plans on our behalf and earn a recurring monthly percentage for as long as they stay subscribed.

hero.title: Earn a monthly income for every client you bring us.
hero.subtitle: Refer a small business to InfoWeb — or sell on our behalf — and receive a recurring percentage of their subscription every month, for as long as they stay with us.
hero.note: Email henrique@sousadev.com — we'll get back to you within 24 h

howItWorks.title: Three steps. Recurring income.
howItWorks.step1Body: Know a restaurant, clinic, or local business that needs a professional website? Introduce them to InfoWeb — or actively pitch our plans on our behalf.
howItWorks.step2Body: Once your referred client signs up and their plan is active, they're linked to your affiliate account. No fuss — we handle everything from onboarding to support.
howItWorks.step3Body: Every billing cycle your client is active, you receive your percentage. It keeps going as long as they stay subscribed — no time limits, no caps.

keyBenefit.title: You earn for life — not just for the first sale.
keyBenefit.body1: Most referral programmes pay you once. Ours pays you every single month your client keeps their subscription active. A single client you bring today could still be generating income for you years from now.
keyBenefit.body2: The only time payments stop is if a client cancels their plan — and InfoWeb's retention is strong because we handle absolutely everything for them.

whoIsThisFor.title: This works for almost anyone.
whoIsThisFor.card1Body: You work with small businesses — add a passive income stream by referring clients who need a website.
whoIsThisFor.card2Body: Your clients ask about websites all the time. Now you can benefit every time one of them signs up.
whoIsThisFor.card3Body: Want to actively sell InfoWeb plans? You can represent us, pitch to prospects, and earn a commission on every subscription you close.
whoIsThisFor.card4Body: Recommend InfoWeb to your audience of small business owners and earn every time one of them subscribes.

cta.title: Reach out and we'll set up your affiliate deal.
cta.body: Send us an email introducing yourself — tell us who you are, how you'd bring clients, and any questions you have. We'll reply within 24 hours and walk you through the details.

footer.tagline: Managed websites for small businesses: domain, hosting, updates, and a clear path to grow online.
footer.hosting: Hosting managed by InfoWeb - Sousa Dev
